title: Searching for Galaxy Cluster-Scale Strong lenses from the DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys
summary: Galaxy cluster-scale strong gravitational lensing systems are rare yet valuable tools for investigating the properties of dark matter and dark energy, as well as providing the opportunity to study the distant universe at flux levels and spatial resolutions that would otherwise be unavailable. Large-scale imaging surveys present unprecedented opportunities to expand the sample of cluster lenses. In this study, we adopt a deep learning-based approach to identify cluster lenses from the DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys, utilizing the catalog of galaxy cluster candidates identified by Zou et al. (2021). Our lens-finder employs a ResNet-18 architecture, trained with mock images of cluster lenses as positives and observational images of cluster scale non-lenses as negatives. We do an iterative operation to increase the completeness of our work, namely adding the found true positive samples back to the training set and training again for several times. Human inspection is conducted to further refine the candidates, categorizing them into grades (A, B, C) according to the significance of the strongly lensed arcs. Reviewing all 540,432 objects in Zou's catalog, we discover 485 high-confidence cluster lens candidates with a cluster $M_{500}$ range of $10^{13.67\sim14.97}M_{\odot}$ and a Brightest Central Galaxy (BCG) redshift range of $0.04\sim0.89$. After excluding the lens candidates listed in previous studies, we identify 247 newly discovered cluster lens candidates, including 16 grade A, 90 grade B, and 141 grade C. This catalog of cluster lens candidates is publicly available online, and follow-up observations are encouraged to confirm and conduct thorough investigations of these systems.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团尺度的强引力透镜系统是稀有但宝贵的工具，可用于研究暗物质和暗能量的性质，并提供以其他方式无法获得的通量水平和空间分辨率来研究遥远宇宙的机会。大规模成像巡天为扩大星系团透镜样本提供了前所未有的机遇。在本研究中，我们采用基于深度学习的方法，利用Zou等人（2021）识别的星系团候选体目录，从DESI传统成像巡天中识别星系团透镜。我们的透镜查找器采用ResNet-18架构，以星系团透镜的模拟图像为正样本，以星系团尺度非透镜的观测图像为负样本进行训练。我们进行迭代操作以提高工作的完整性，即将找到的真阳性样本添加回训练集并再次训练多次。通过人工检查进一步筛选候选体，根据强透镜弧的显著性将其分为A、B、C三个等级。在审查Zou目录中的所有540,432个天体后，我们发现了485个高置信度的星系团透镜候选体，其星系团$M_{500}$范围为$10^{13.67\sim14.97}M_{\odot}$，最亮中心星系（BCG）红移范围为$0.04\sim0.89$。在排除先前研究中列出的透镜候选体后，我们识别出247个新发现的星系团透镜候选体，包括16个A级、90个B级和141个C级。该星系团透镜候选体目录已在线公开，鼓励进行后续观测以确认并深入研究这些系统。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，成功建立了星系团引力透镜候选体目录并公开，鼓励后续观测确认并深入研究这些系统。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: The cross-entropy loss on the training and validation sets over 200 training epochs with two cases in the final iteration of our training. In Case 1, we adopt Adam optimizer, configured with a batch size of 32, a learning rate of \(3\times 10^{-6}\) , and a weight decay of \(1\times 10^{-1}\) . Moreover, in Case 2, We use a initial learning rate of \(1\times 10^{-4}\) , a final learning rate of \(1\times 10^{-5}\) , a weight decay of \(1\times 10^{-2}\) , with Cosine Annealing. The vertical dashed line at epoch 20 and 90 indicates the early stopping points we selected in the two cases, which is the highest point of the AUC (Case 2), or the highest AUC before the training loss become abnormal (Case 1). Middle: The Area Under the ROC curve as a function of epoch in the same training session. Right: The derivative of AUC as a function of epoch in the same training session.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：在训练的最后一次迭代中，两种情况下训练集和验证集在200个训练周期上的交叉熵损失。在情况1中，我们采用Adam优化器，批大小为32，学习率为\(3\times 10^{-6}\)，权重衰减为\(1\times 10^{-1}\)。此外，在情况2中，我们使用初始学习率\(1\times 10^{-4}\)，最终学习率\(1\times 10^{-5}\)，权重衰减\(1\times 10^{-2}\)，并采用余弦退火。在周期20和90处的垂直虚线表示我们在两种情况下选择的早停点，即AUC的最高点（情况2），或训练损失变得异常之前的最高AUC（情况1）。中图：同一训练过程中ROC曲线下面积随周期的变化。右图：同一训练过程中AUC的导数随周期的变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison of the performance of our classifier evaluated with validation and testing sets separately. The left panel shows the ROC curve (orange line) of our classifier on the validation set containing our mock images with the area under the curve (AUC=0.939). And the ROC curve (blue line) of our classifier on the testing set containing the lens candidates from the COOL-LAMPS project (Mork et al. , 2025 ) with the area under the curve (AUC=0.722). The right panel shows the PR curve for the above two cases. We also mark the threshold (0.986) adopted in last iteration with red stars.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们的分类器在验证集和测试集上分别评估的性能比较。左图显示我们的分类器在包含模拟图像的验证集上的ROC曲线（橙色线），曲线下面积（AUC=0.939）。以及我们的分类器在包含来自COOL-LAMPS项目（Mork等人，2025）的透镜候选体的测试集上的ROC曲线（蓝色线），曲线下面积（AUC=0.722）。右图显示上述两种情况的PR曲线。我们还用红色星号标记了最后一次迭代中采用的阈值（0.986）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Performance of our classifier along with the interations. Left Panel shows the cumulative number at each iteration, shown for all candidates and separately for the three grades. The middle and right panels shows the Purity and completeness when applying our classifier to the testing set containing the lens candidates from the COOL-LAMPS project.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：我们的分类器在迭代过程中的性能。左图显示每次迭代的累积数量，包括所有候选体以及分别按三个等级显示。中图和右图显示将我们的分类器应用于包含来自COOL-LAMPS项目的透镜候选体的测试集时的纯度和完整性。

title: Discovery of a gas-enshrouded broad-line AGN at z $\sim$ 7
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, resubmitted after addressing the referee report
summary: The Lyman-alpha (Ly$α$) absorption profile in star-forming galaxies serves as a powerful tracer of the extended, dense neutral hydrogen in their surroundings during the Epoch of Reionization (EoR). We report a unique galaxy, A2744-z7DLA, at $z\approx 6.87$ gravitationally lensed by the foreground galaxy cluster Abell 2744, which exhibits both moderate Ly$α$ emission and damped Ly$α$ absorption, suggesting the presence of a dense neutral hydrogen environment. Our analysis suggests that the UV continuum turnover near Ly$α$ is more likely shaped by a damped Ly$α$ system rather than nebular continuum from two photon process. We analyze the physical properties of A2744-z7DLA with spectroscopic and photometric data from the JWST and the HST. The galaxy shows a compact morphology ($r_e \sim 0.3\ {\rm kpc}$) and a broadened H$α$ emission line, suggesting possible AGN activity. The broad component of H$α$ has a FWHM of $2721 \pm 200\ {\rm km\ s^{-1}}$, corresponding to a black hole mass of $M_{\rm BH}=2.90^{+2.35}_{-1.28}\times 10^7 M_\odot$ and a black hole-to-stellar mass ratio of $\log (M_{\rm BH}/M_{\rm stellar}) = -1.58^{+0.45}_{-0.34}$. The Balmer decrement ($\rm Hα/Hβ$) yields a dust attenuation of $\rm A_V \approx 1.15 \pm 0.23$, indicating that this system is less dust-rich than some "little red dots". Furthermore, we perform SED fitting using both stellar and AGN models. The results show that the UV and optical wavelengths are dominated by star-forming regions, while the AGN component contributes primarily at longer wavelengths. This work provides new insights into the interplay between star formation, neutral gas, and potential AGN activity in galaxies during the EoR.

AI.tldr: 在z≈6.87处发现一个独特星系A2744-z7DLA，同时具有莱曼α发射和阻尼莱曼α吸收特征，表明存在致密中性氢环境，并可能包含活动星系核。
AI.motivation: 研究再电离时期星系的莱曼α吸收特征，探索星系周围中性氢环境的性质，以及星系形成早期阶段恒星形成、中性气体和AGN活动之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 利用JWST和HST的光谱和测光数据，分析星系物理性质；通过莱曼α吸收谱线特征、Hα发射线展宽、巴尔末减幅等指标，结合SED拟合（恒星和AGN模型）进行研究。
AI.result: 发现星系具有紧凑形态（re∼0.3 kpc）和展宽的Hα发射线（FWHM=2721±200 km/s），表明可能存在AGN活动；估算黑洞质量为2.90×10⁷ M⊙，黑洞-恒星质量比为-1.58；尘埃衰减AV≈1.15，比某些"小红点"星系尘埃少；SED拟合显示紫外和光学波段由恒星形成主导，AGN贡献主要在长波。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为再电离时期星系的恒星形成、中性气体环境和潜在AGN活动之间的相互作用提供了新见解，表明莱曼α吸收特征可用于探测早期星系周围的致密中性氢环境。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 莱曼α（Lyα）吸收轮廓在恒星形成星系中是再电离时期（EoR）其周围延伸的致密中性氢的有力示踪物。我们报告了一个独特的星系A2744-z7DLA，其红移z≈6.87，受到前景星系团Abell 2744的引力透镜效应，该星系同时表现出中等强度的Lyα发射和阻尼Lyα吸收，表明存在致密的中性氢环境。我们的分析表明，Lyα附近的紫外连续谱转折更可能由阻尼Lyα系统而非双光子过程的星云连续谱所塑造。我们利用JWST和HST的光谱与测光数据分析了A2744-z7DLA的物理性质。该星系呈现紧凑形态（r_e ∼ 0.3 kpc）和展宽的Hα发射线，暗示可能存在活动星系核（AGN）活动。Hα的宽成分半高全宽（FWHM）为2721 ± 200 km s⁻¹，对应的黑洞质量为M_BH = 2.90^{+2.35}_{-1.28} × 10⁷ M_⊙，黑洞与恒星质量比为log(M_BH/M_stellar) = -1.58^{+0.45}_{-0.34}。巴尔末递减（Hα/Hβ）得出的尘埃消光为A_V ≈ 1.15 ± 0.23，表明该系统比某些“小红点”的尘埃含量更少。此外，我们使用恒星和AGN模型进行了SED拟合。结果显示，紫外和光学波段主要由恒星形成区主导，而AGN成分主要在更长波长处贡献。这项工作为再电离时期星系中恒星形成、中性气体和潜在AGN活动之间的相互作用提供了新见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究为再电离时期星系的恒星形成、中性气体环境和潜在AGN活动之间的相互作用提供了新见解，表明莱曼α吸收特征可用于探测早期星系周围的致密中性氢环境。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Images and rest frame spectroscopy of A2744-z7DLA. Top: The 2D prism spectrum extracted using the msaexp pipeline from Gabe Brammer. Bottom: The extracted 1D spectrum is shown in gray, with the \(1\sigma\) error indicated by the light gray shading. Broadband photometry measurements from the literature (Treu & Paris, 2023 ) are included as light green dots with error bars. The light green curve represents the best-fit power law model of the rest-frame UV continuum, spanning \(1500-2600\ {\AA }\) . Important emission line wavelengths are marked with vertical dashed lines. It is evident that A2744-z7DLA exhibits a series of prominent Balmer lines and weak Ly \(\alpha\) emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：A2744-z7DLA的图像和静止系光谱。上：使用Gabe Brammer的msaexp管道提取的二维棱镜光谱。下：提取的一维光谱以灰色显示，1σ误差以浅灰色阴影表示。来自文献（Treu & Paris, 2023）的宽带测光测量以浅绿色点加误差棒的形式包含在内。浅绿色曲线表示静止系紫外连续谱的最佳拟合幂律模型，覆盖1500-2600 Å。重要的发射线波长以垂直虚线标出。显然，A2744-z7DLA展示了一系列显著的巴尔末线和微弱的Lyα发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: GalfitS AGN–host decomposition of A2744-z7DLA. The first column displays the observed images in seven filters; the second column shows data subtracted by PSF model; the third column presents the Sérsic model; and the fourth column shows the residuals divided by the errors. We wrote the stellar mass, effective radius and Sérsic index on the lower left of the panel in first row. The residual images indicate that the model successfully reproduces the observed characteristics of A2744-z7DLA in most bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：A2744-z7DLA的GalfitS AGN–宿主分解。第一列显示七个滤光片中的观测图像；第二列显示减去PSF模型后的数据；第三列呈现Sérsic模型；第四列显示残差除以误差。我们在第一行面板的左下角标注了恒星质量、有效半径和Sérsic指数。残差图像表明，该模型成功再现了A2744-z7DLA在大多数波段中的观测特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: SED fitting results from CIGALE and Bagpipes . The total model spectra from CIGALE and Bagpipes are shown as blue and cyan curve. The observed photometric fluxes for the filters F814W, F105W, F125W, F140W, F160W, F115W, F150W, F200W, F277W, F356W, F410M, and F444W are shown as white points. The observed flux and error are represented by the gray curve and shaded region, respectively. We zoom in on the UV turnover part of the spectrum in the upper-right corner of this figure. Both the CIGALE and Bagpipes models reproduce the UV and optical observations well, but neither fits the curvature at the red end of 1216 \(\ {\AA }\) successfully.

title: KiDS-Legacy: WIMP dark matter constraints from the cross-correlation of weak lensing and Fermi-LAT gamma rays
summary: Dark matter dominates the matter content of the Universe, and its properties can be constrained through large-scale structure probes such as the cross-correlation between the unresolved gamma-ray background (UGRB) and weak gravitational lensing. We analysed 15 years of Fermi-LAT data, constructing UGRB intensity maps in ten energy bins (0.5-1000 GeV), and cross-correlated them with KiDS-Legacy shear in six tomographic bins. The measurements were performed using angular power spectra estimated with the pseudo-$C_\ell$ method. No significant cross-correlation is found. Based on this non-detection, we present 95% upper bounds on the weakly interacting massive particle (WIMP) decay rate $Γ_{\rm dec}$ and velocity-averaged annihilation cross-section $\langleσ_{\rm ann} v\rangle$ as functions of mass. We compare our results with bounds from other cosmological tracers and from local probes, and found them to be complementary, particularly at low masses ($\rm GeV/TeV$). In addition, using a Euclid-like lensing survey cross-correlated with Fermi-LAT, we forecast $\sim$2 times tighter limits, highlighting the potential of forthcoming data to strengthen constraints on dark matter annihilation and decay.

title: Molecular gas and star formation in central rings across nearby galaxies
comment: 17 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication at A&A
summary: Nearby galaxies exhibit a variety of structures, including central rings, similar to the MW Central Molecular Zone (CMZ). These rings are common in barred galaxies and can be gas-rich and highly star-forming. We aim to study molecular gas content and star formation rate of central rings within nearby galaxies and link them to global galaxy properties (e.g. bar morphology). We utilize $1\,$'' resolution CO(2-1) PHANGS-ALMA observations, visually identify 20 central rings and determine their properties. For $14$ rings, SFR surface density maps are available. We derive ring geometry, integrated molecular gas masses, SFRs, depletion times, and compare them to host galaxy and bar properties. Molecular gas is a good tracer for central rings: Previous studies used ionized gas and dust tracers to identify central rings in galaxies of similar morphological types as this study. In comparison, we find similar fractions of galaxies hosting central rings and similar radii distributions. The gaseous central rings have typical radii of $400_{-150}^{+250}\,$pc, molecular gas masses of $\log(M_\text{mol}/M_\odot){\sim}8.1_{-0.23}^{+0.17}$, and SFRs of $0.21_{-0.16}^{+0.15}\,M_\odot/\text{yr}$, thus contributing $5.6_{-2.1}^{+4.5}\,\%$ and $13_{-5}^{+10}\,\%$ to their host galaxies' molecular gas mass and SFR. The MW CMZ sits at the lower end of the radius, molecular gas mass, and SFR distribution, but it has a similar molecular gas mass and SFR fraction, and depletion time. Longer bars contain more massive molecular central rings, but we find no correlation between bar strength and the ring's molecular gas content. Although absolute central ring properties likely depend on host galaxy properties, the similarities between the MW CMZ and PHANGS central rings in relative parameters suggest that the processes of gas inflow and star formation are similar for central rings across nearby galaxies.

AI.tldr: 利用高分辨率CO(2-1)观测研究附近星系中心环的分子气体含量和恒星形成率，发现银河系中央分子区与这些中心环在相对参数上相似
AI.motivation: 研究附近星系中心环的分子气体含量和恒星形成率，并将其与银河系中央分子区(CMZ)进行比较，了解中心环的形成机制和演化过程
AI.method: 使用PHANGS-ALMA的1角秒分辨率CO(2-1)观测数据，视觉识别20个中心环，测量其几何形状、分子气体质量、恒星形成率、消耗时间等参数，并与宿主星系和棒状结构特性进行比较
AI.result: 中心环典型半径约400pc，分子气体质量约10^8.1太阳质量，恒星形成率约0.21太阳质量/年，贡献宿主星系分子气体质量的5.6%和恒星形成率的13%；银河系CMZ处于分布的低端但相对参数相似；较长棒状结构包含更高质量的中心环
AI.conclusion: 尽管绝对参数可能依赖于宿主星系特性，但银河系CMZ与PHANGS中心环在相对参数上的相似性表明，附近星系中心环的气体流入和恒星形成过程是相似的

artifacts.abstract_zh: 邻近星系展现出多种结构，包括类似于银河系中央分子区（CMZ）的中心环。这些环在棒旋星系中很常见，可能富含气体并具有高恒星形成率。我们旨在研究邻近星系中心环的分子气体含量和恒星形成率，并将其与星系的整体性质（例如棒形态）联系起来。我们利用分辨率为1角秒的CO(2-1) PHANGS-ALMA观测数据，通过目视识别出20个中心环并确定其性质。对于其中14个环，可获得其恒星形成率面密度图。我们推导了环的几何结构、总分子气体质量、恒星形成率、消耗时间，并将其与宿主星系和棒的性质进行比较。分子气体是追踪中心环的良好示踪物：先前的研究利用电离气体和尘埃示踪物在类似形态类型的星系中识别中心环。相比之下，我们发现拥有中心环的星系比例以及环的半径分布相似。气体中心环的典型半径为400_{-150}^{+250} pc，分子气体质量为log(M_mol/M_⊙)~8.1_{-0.23}^{+0.17}，恒星形成率为0.21_{-0.16}^{+0.15} M_⊙/yr，分别贡献了宿主星系分子气体质量和恒星形成率的5.6_{-2.1}^{+4.5}%和13_{-5}^{+10}%。银河系CMZ位于半径、分子气体质量和恒星形成率分布的低端，但其分子气体质量分数、恒星形成率分数和消耗时间相似。更长的棒包含更巨大的分子中心环，但我们未发现棒强度与环的分子气体含量之间存在相关性。尽管中心环的绝对性质可能依赖于宿主星系的性质，但银河系CMZ与PHANGS中心环在相对参数上的相似性表明，邻近星系中心环的气体流入和恒星形成过程是相似的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：尽管绝对参数可能依赖于宿主星系特性，但银河系CMZ与PHANGS中心环在相对参数上的相似性表明，附近星系中心环的气体流入和恒星形成过程是相似的。

title: ALMA Polarization Study of the Magnetic Fields in Two Massive Clumps in the 20 km s$^{-1}$ Cloud of the Central Molecular Zone
comment: Accepted for publication in the Astrophysical Journal
summary: We present the Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) observations of linearly polarized 870 $μ$m continuum emission at a resolution of $\sim$0.2$^{\prime\prime}$ (2000 au) toward the two massive clumps, Clump 1 and Clump 4, in the 20 km s$^{-1}$ cloud. The derived magnetic field strengths for both clumps range from $\sim$0.3 to 3.1 mG using the Angular Dispersion Function (ADF) method. The magnetic field orientations across multiple scales suggests that the magnetic field dominates at the cloud scale, whereas gravity likely governs the structures at the core (0.01$-$0.1 pc) and condensation ($\le$ 0.01 pc) scales. Furthermore, the study on the angular difference between the orientations of the local gravity gradient and the magnetic field suggests that the magnetic field predominantly governs the dynamics in the diffuse regions, while gravity and star formation feedback become increasingly significant within the dense regions. The ratio of the magnetic field tension force $F_\textrm{B}$ to the gravitational force $F_\textrm{G}$ suggests that the magnetic field may provide some support against gravity, but it is insufficient to prevent gas from infalling toward the dense cores.

AI.tldr: ALMA观测显示20 km/s云中两个大质量团块的磁场强度为0.3-3.1 mG，磁场在云尺度主导，重力在核心和凝聚尺度主导，磁场对重力有一定支撑但不足以阻止气体向致密核心坍缩。
AI.motivation: 研究大质量恒星形成区域中磁场与重力相互作用的相对重要性，了解磁场在不同尺度上对气体动力学的影响。
AI.method: 使用ALMA观测870 μm连续谱的线性偏振辐射，分辨率约0.2角秒（2000天文单位），采用角弥散函数（ADF）方法推导磁场强度。
AI.result: 两个团块的磁场强度范围为0.3-3.1 mG；磁场在云尺度主导结构，重力在核心和凝聚尺度主导；磁场在弥散区域主导动力学，而重力和恒星形成反馈在致密区域更重要；磁场张力与重力比值表明磁场对重力有一定支撑但不足以阻止气体坍缩。
AI.conclusion: 磁场在大质量恒星形成区域中提供部分支撑作用，但不足以完全抵抗重力，重力仍是驱动气体向致密核心坍缩的主要力量，特别是在小尺度上。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究银河系中心分子云中的大质量团块磁场，属于银河系内恒星形成领域。用户主要兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和星际介质，与本文的银河系内大质量恒星形成主题重叠有限。虽然涉及ALMA、磁场、分子等关键词，但缺乏强引力透镜、高红移星系或核心作者等核心匹配点。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）对20 km s$^{-1}$云中两个大质量团块（团块1和团块4）在870 $\mu$m波长上的线性偏振连续谱观测，分辨率约为$\sim$0.2$^{\prime\prime}$（2000 au）。利用角弥散函数（ADF）方法，推导出两个团块的磁场强度范围约为$\sim$0.3至3.1 mG。多尺度上的磁场取向表明，在云尺度上磁场占主导地位，而在核心（0.01$-$0.1 pc）和凝聚体（$\le$ 0.01 pc）尺度上，重力可能主导结构。此外，对局部重力梯度方向与磁场方向之间角差的研究表明，在弥漫区域磁场主要控制动力学，而在致密区域内重力和恒星形成反馈变得越来越重要。磁场张力$F_\textrm{B}$与重力$F_\textrm{G}$的比值表明，磁场可能对重力提供部分支撑，但不足以阻止气体向致密核心下落。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：磁场在大质量恒星形成区域中提供部分支撑作用，但不足以完全抵抗重力，重力仍是驱动气体向致密核心坍缩的主要力量，特别是在小尺度上。

title: Euclid: Galaxy SED reconstruction in the PHZ processing function: impact on the PSF and the role of medium-band filters
summary: Weak lensing surveys require accurate correction for the point spread function (PSF) when measuring galaxy shapes. For a diffraction-limited PSF, as arises in space-based missions, this correction depends on each galaxy SED. In the Euclid mission, galaxy SED reconstruction, a tasks of the photometric-redshift processing function (PHZ PF), relies on broad- and medium-band ancillary photometry. The limited wavelength sampling of the Euclid VIS passband and signal-to-noise ratio may affect the reconstruction accuracy and translate into biases in the weak lensing measurements. In this study, we present the methodology, which is employed in the Euclid PHZ PF, for reconstructing galaxy SEDs at 55 wavelengths, sampling the VIS passband every 10 nm, and we assess whether it fulfils the accuracy requirements imposed on the Euclid PSF model. We employ both physics- and data-driven methods, focusing on a new approach of template-based flux correction and Gaussian processes, and we introduce an SED metric whose bias propagates into PSF quadrupole moment errors. Our findings demonstrate that Gaussian processes and template fitting meet the requirements only in specific, but complementary, redshift intervals. We therefore propose a hybrid approach, which leverages both methods. This solution proves to be effective in meeting the Euclid accuracy requirements for most of the redshift range of the survey. Finally, we investigate the impact on the SED reconstruction of a new set of 16 evenly-spaced medium-band filters for the Subaru telescope, providing quasi-spectroscopic coverage of the VIS passband. This study shows promising results, ensuring accurate SED reconstruction and meeting the mission PSF requirements. This work thus provides not only the methodological foundation of galaxy SED reconstruction in the Euclid PHZ PF, but also a roadmap for future improvements using a new medium-band survey.

AI.tldr: 欧几里得任务中星系SED重建方法研究：针对空间望远镜衍射极限PSF校正需求，开发混合方法（高斯过程+模板拟合）满足PSF模型精度要求，并探索新中波段滤波器的改进潜力。
AI.motivation: 弱引力透镜测量需要精确校正点扩散函数（PSF），对于空间望远镜的衍射极限PSF，校正依赖于每个星系的光谱能量分布（SED）。欧几里得任务中，星系SED重建依赖于宽波段和中波段测光数据，但VIS波段的有限波长采样和信噪比可能影响重建精度，进而导致弱透镜测量偏差。
AI.method: 采用物理驱动和数据驱动混合方法：1）基于模板的流量校正；2）高斯过程回归。开发了SED度量指标，其偏差会传播到PSF四极矩误差中。最终提出结合两种方法的混合方法，并在VIS波段每10nm采样55个波长点重建星系SED。
AI.result: 高斯过程和模板拟合各自只能在特定但互补的红移区间满足要求。混合方法在大部分调查红移范围内都能满足欧几里得精度要求。研究还发现，斯巴鲁望远镜新的16个均匀间隔中波段滤波器能提供VIS波段的准光谱覆盖，显著改善SED重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为欧几里得PHZ PF中的星系SED重建提供了方法论基础，并展示了未来使用新中波段巡天进行改进的路线图。混合方法能够满足任务PSF要求，确保准确的SED重建，为弱透镜测量提供可靠支持。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 弱引力透镜巡天在测量星系形状时需要精确校正点扩散函数（PSF）。对于空间任务中出现的衍射极限PSF，这种校正依赖于每个星系的SED。在欧几里得任务中，星系SED重建是测光红移处理功能（PHZ PF）的一项任务，依赖于宽带和中波段辅助测光。欧几里得VIS通带有限的波长采样和信噪比可能影响重建精度，并转化为弱引力透镜测量中的偏差。在本研究中，我们介绍了欧几里得PHZ PF中用于在55个波长处重建星系SED的方法，每10 nm采样VIS通带一次，并评估其是否满足欧几里得PSF模型所施加的精度要求。我们采用了基于物理和数据驱动的方法，重点关注基于模板的通量校正和高斯过程的新方法，并引入了一个SED度量，其偏差会传播到PSF四极矩误差中。我们的发现表明，高斯过程和模板拟合仅在特定但互补的红移区间内满足要求。因此，我们提出了一种混合方法，利用了这两种方法。该解决方案被证明在满足欧几里得巡天大部分红移范围的精度要求方面是有效的。最后，我们研究了为斯巴鲁望远镜设计的一组新的16个均匀间隔的中波段滤光片对SED重建的影响，这些滤光片提供了VIS通带的准光谱覆盖。这项研究显示出有希望的结果，确保了准确的SED重建并满足任务PSF要求。因此，这项工作不仅为欧几里得PHZ PF中的星系SED重建提供了方法论基础，也为未来使用新中波段巡天进行改进提供了路线图。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，本研究为欧几里得PHZ PF中的星系SED重建提供了方法论基础，并展示了未来使用新中波段巡天进行改进的路线图。混合方法能够满足任务PSF要求，确保准确的SED重建，为弱透镜测量提供可靠支持。
